title: Home page loads with planner and navigation
steps: Observe the hero title, planner form, and navigation links
expectedResult: The page renders the Trip Budget Planner heading, planner form controls, and links for Planner, History, and Insights.

title: Valid trip plan calculates summary and enables save
expectedResult: The summary values are rendered correctly and the Save Trip button becomes enabled.

title: Saving a valid trip persists it to history
expectedResult: The saved trip appears in history with destination, style, budget, and risk details.

title: History filter shows only matching styles
steps: Save trips with different travel styles
expectedResult: Only Comfort trips remain visible in the history list.

title: Insights page shows aggregate stats from saved data
expectedResult: The page shows total trip count, average total budget, average daily budget, most common style, and Too Tight count.

title: Reset clears form and disables save
expectedResult: The form is cleared, results return to placeholders, and Save Trip is disabled again.

title: Blank submission shows required errors
steps: Submit the planner form without entering values
expectedResult: Required field errors appear and no trip plan is generated.

title: Trip name below minimum is rejected
steps: Enter a one-character trip name with otherwise valid values
expectedResult: The trip name validation message appears and planning does not complete.

title: Server rejects malformed trip payload
steps: Send a malformed POST request to the backend
expectedResult: The backend returns a validation error response and does not store the trip.

title: Minimum valid values compute Too Tight risk
steps: Enter the minimum valid budget and counts
expectedResult: The plan is generated and the risk level is Too Tight.

title: Balanced risk threshold is inclusive at 35
steps: Enter values that produce daily per traveler exactly 35

title: Maximum valid values compute successfully
expectedResult: The plan renders without validation errors and the totals display correctly.

title: Clear all removes persisted trips from history
expectedResult: The history list is emptied and the empty-state message is shown.

title: Insights page returns to empty state after clearing trips
expectedResult: The insights page shows zeroed stats or an empty-state message.

title: Save still persists if the user navigates away immediately
expectedResult: The trip is still saved and appears in history even if the page changes quickly.

title: Compare page shows saved trips and best-value spotlight
expectedResult: The compare page renders saved trips in a table and highlights the best-value trip.
